title: ePassport VC schema (SD-JWT) — photoID namespaces at top-level
description: Single JSON Schema for an SD-JWT-based ePassport/photoID credential. The credential payload consists of SD-JWT envelope fields plus top-level namespace properties carrying photoID elements.

vct#integrity.title: vct#integrity
vct#integrity.description: A hash computed over the credential type metadata to ensure that the metadata hasn't been altered.

org.iso.23220.1.title: Base data elements for photoID defined in ISO/IEC 23220-4 table C.1

family_name.description: Last name, surname, or primary identifier, of the holder. Presence: M. Encoding: tstr.

given_name.description: First name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier, of the holder. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

family_name_viz.description: Family name as defined for VIZ (visual inspection zone) in ICAO 9303. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

given_name_viz.description: Given name as defined for VIZ (visual inspection zone) in ICAO 9303. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

birth_date.description: Day, month and year on which the holder was born in full-date format (YYYY-MM-DD) as per ISO 8601-1. If parts are unknown, issuing authority picks one exact date. Presence: M. Encoding: full-date.

approximate_mask.description: 8-digit flag (YYYYMMDD order) where 1 indicates masked/unknown parts of birth_date. Not used for age calculations. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

portrait.description: Portrait data encoded as JPEG or JPEG 2000 as specified in ISO/IEC 18013-2:2020. Presence: M. Encoding: bstr. For representation in JSON schema Section 8.2.3 of ISO 23220-2 reference base64-without padding string as specified in RFC 8949:2020, 6.1.

enrolment_portrait_image.description: Enrolment portrait image as JPEG or JPEG 2000. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. To be used as live biometric image for IATA use case. For representation in JSON schema Section 8.2.3 of ISO 23220-2 reference base64-without padding string as specified in RFC 8949:2020, 6.1.

issue_date.description: Date mobile eID document was issued Presence: M. Encoding: full_date.

expiry_date.description: Date mobile eID document expires. Presence: M. Encoding: full_date.

issuing_authority.description: Name of issuing authority. Presence: M. Encoding: tstr.

issuing_country.description: Country code as alpha 2 and alpha 3 code, defined in ISO 3166-1, which issued the mobile eID document or within which the issuing authority is located. Presence: M. Encoding: tstr.

age_over_18.description: Age of holder is greater than 18 years. Presence: M. Encoding: bool.

age_in_years.description: The age of the holder. Presence: R. Encoding: uint.

age_over_NN.description: Check ISO/IEC 23220-2 Section 6.3.2.2. Age attestation: Nearest true attestation above request. Presence: R. Encoding: bool.

age_birth_year.description: The year when the holder was born. Presence: R. Encoding: uint.

portrait_capture_date.description: Date when portrait was taken. Presence: O. Encoding: tdate.

birthplace.description: Country and municipality or state/province where the holder was born. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

name_at_birth.description: The name(s) which holder was born. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_address.description: The place where the holder resides and/or may be contacted (street/house number, municipality etc.). Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_city.description: The city/municipality (or equivalent) where the holder lives. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_postal_code.description: The postal code of the holder Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_country.description: The country where the holder lives as a two letter country code (alpha-2 code) defined in ISO 3166-1. Presence: O. Encoding: check ISO 3166-1.

resident_city_latin1.description: The city/municipality (or equivalent) where the holder lives, Latin 1 characters. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

sex.description: Holder's sex using values as defined in ISO/IEC 5218. Presence: O. Encoding: uint.

nationality.description: Nationality of the Holder as two letter country code (alpha-2 code) or three letter code (alpha-3 code) defined in ISO 3166-1. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

document_number.description: The number assigned or calculated by the issuing authority. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

issuing_subdivision.description: Subdivision code as defined in ISO 3166-2, which issued the mobile eID document or within which the issuing authority located. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

family_name_latin1.description: Last name, surname, or primary identifier, of the holder, Latin1 characters. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

given_name_latin1.description: First name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier, of the holder. Latin1 characters Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

org.iso.23220.photoID.1.title: Additional data elements for photo ID defined in ISO/IEC 23220-4 table C.2

person_id.description: Person identifier of the photo ID holder. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

birth_country.description: The country where the photo ID holder was born, as an Alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

birth_state.description: The state, province, district or local area where the photo ID holder was born. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

birth_city.description: The municipality, city, town or village where the photo ID holder was born. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

administrative_number.description: A number assigned by the photo ID holder issuer for audit control or other purposes. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_street.description: The name of the street where the photo ID holder currently resides. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

resident_house_number.description: The house number where the photo ID holder currently resides, including any affix or suffix. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

travel_document_type.description: Identifier of the type of source document (if associated to or derived from a travel document). Shall be present if dg1 data element from table C.3 exists but optional otherwise. Presence: C. Encoding: tstr.

travel_document_number.description: The number of the travel document to which the photo ID is associated (if associated to or derived from a travel document). Presence: C. Encoding: tstr.

resident_state.description: The state/province/district where the holder lives. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

travel_document_mrz.description: Machine readable zone as the text printed on the physical document. It shall be present if dg1 data element from table C.3 exists but optional otherwise. Presence: C. Encoding: tstr.

org.iso.23220.datagroups.1.title: Data elements containing the data groups defined by ICAO 9303 and referenced in ISO/IEC 23220-4 table C.3

version.description: Version identifier for the ICAO 9303 data groups. Presence: O. Encoding: tstr.

dg1.description: Data Group 1: Biographic data (data recorded in MRZ). Presence: C. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg2.description: Data Group 2: Reference portrait (encoded face). Presence: C. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg3.description: Data Group 3: Encoded fingers. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg4.description: Data Group 4: Encoded eye(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg5.description: Data Group 5: Displayed portrait. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg6.description: Data Group 6: Reserved for future use. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg7.description: Data Group 7: Displayed signature or usual mark. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg8.description: Data Group 8: Data feature(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg9.description: Data Group 9: Structure feature(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg10.description: Data Group 10: Substance feature(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg11.description: Data Group 11: Additional personal detail(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg12.description: Data Group 12: Additional document detail(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg13.description: Data Group 13: Optional detail(s). Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg14.description: Data Group 14: Security options. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg15.description: Data Group 15: Active authentication public key info. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

dg16.description: Data Group 16: Person(s) to notify. Presence: O. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.

sod.description: Security Object Data (SOD). Presence: C. Encoding: bstr. Represented as base64 string (no padding) per RFC 8949 6.1.
